info.title: test-prune
info.description: CLI for TestPrune — only run the tests affected by your change

commands.name: dead-code
commands.description: Detect unreachable symbols from entry points

commands.name: help
commands.description:
Show this help message
dead-code options:
--entry <pattern>   Add entry point pattern (repeatable)
Default: *.main, *.Program.*, *.Routes.*, *.Scheduler.*
--include-tests     Include symbols from test files in dead code report
--verbose           Show why each symbol is unreachable

commands.name: index
commands.description: Build the dependency graph from source

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run affected tests based on changes

options.name: --repo
options.description: Use <path> as the repo root (default: auto-detect from cwd)

options.name: --parallelism
options.description: Max parallel project analyses (default: processor count)
